name: @b-a-m-n/kontrol
description: Local agent control plane with MCP workspaces, ACP workers, review loops, and policy gates.

scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:app && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && npm run build:copy-mjs
scripts.test: node --check scripts/acp-crush-adapter.mjs && node --check scripts/acp-hermes-native-adapter.mjs && node --check scripts/acp-stdio-duplex-adapter.mjs && python3 -m py_compile scripts/hermes-native-runner.py && node src/worker-token.test.mjs && node src/extract-task.test.mjs && node src/start-all.test.mjs && node src/acp-adapter.test.mjs && node src/hermes-native-adapter.test.mjs && node src/acp-stdio-duplex-adapter.test.mjs && tsx src/config.test.ts && tsx src/ui/card-types.test.ts && tsx src/ui/patch-display.test.ts && tsx src/apply-patch.test.ts && tsx src/process-platform.test.ts && tsx src/process-sessions.test.ts && tsx src/roots.test.ts && tsx src/skills.test.ts && tsx src/workspaces.test.ts && tsx src/review-checkpoints.test.ts && tsx src/oauth-store.test.ts && tsx src/cli.test.ts && tsx src/auth-tunnel.test.ts && tsx src/acp-gateway.test.ts && tsx src/continuation.test.ts && tsx src/mission-ledger.test.ts && tsx src/bridge-flow.test.ts && tsx src/enforcement-layer.test.ts && tsx src/policy.test.ts && tsx src/acp-duplex.test.ts && npm run test:package
